_comment: Example bookmarks.json format. Any of these top-level shapes work: a plain array, {bookmarks: [...]}, {tweets: [...]}, or {items: [...]}. Each entry needs at minimum a `url`. The other fields are all optional but improve the digest.

bookmarks.title: A great essay on local-first software
bookmarks.author: ink-and-switch

bookmarks.text: Sometimes you bookmark something with just text, no title. digestd will use the first 200 chars as the title.
